channel.title: Frontion News - Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran's Revolutionary Guards Seize Wartime Power, Blunting Supreme Leader's Role
item.description: Two months into the war with the US and Israel, Iran no longer has a single undisputed clerical arbiter at the pinnacle of power, a break with the past that may be hardening Tehran's stance in negotiations with Washington.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Intelligence Studies How Iran Would React to Trump Declaring Victory
item.description: US spy agencies are examining scenarios where President Trump declares a unilateral victory in the two-month-old Iran war, which has killed thousands and become a political liability for the White House.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Says Iran Wants US to Open Hormuz Strait as Soon as Possible
item.description: President Trump stated that Iran has communicated it is in a "state of collapse" and wants the United States to open the Strait of Hormuz while it sorts out its leadership situation amid ongoing peace talks.

item.title: 🇯🇵🛢️ First Japan-Linked Crude Tanker Crosses Hormuz Since Iran War Began
item.description: The Panama-flagged tanker Idemitsu Maru, carrying 2 million barrels of Saudi oil, successfully crossed the Strait of Hormuz, marking the first Japan-linked crude tanker to navigate the waterway since the conflict started.

item.title: ⚖️ Purdue Pharma Criminal Sentence Could Mark Final Step Before Dissolution
item.description: OxyContin maker Purdue Pharma faces a $225 million criminal sentence, potentially the last legal step before the company dissolves over its role in the opioid crisis that killed hundreds of thousands.

item.title: ⚖️ US Soldier Charged with Using Classified Intel to Win K on Polymarket
item.description: A US special forces soldier pleaded not guilty to charges of using classified information about the mission to capture Venezuela's Maduro to win over ,000 on prediction market Polymarket. The case raises concerns about insider trading on prediction platforms.

item.title: 🏛️ DOJ Indicts Former FBI Director James Comey a Second Time
item.description: The US Department of Justice has indicted former FBI Director James Comey for a second time, according to CNN reports. The indictment marks an escalation in tensions between the Trump administration and the former FBI chief.

item.title: 🇦🇪🛢️ UAE Announces Departure from OPEC, Dealing Major Blow to Oil Cartel
item.description: The United Arab Emirates announced it will leave OPEC effective May 1, stripping the organization of its third-largest producer. The move comes amid tensions over production policies during the Iran conflict and could reshape global oil markets.

item.title: 🇺🇸🤖 Google Signs Classified AI Deal With Pentagon for Military Applications
item.description: Alphabet's Google joined a growing list of technology firms signing deals with the U.S. Department of Defense to use AI models for classified work. The move marks a significant expansion of tech-military collaboration amid the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇸🇦🤝 Gulf Leaders Hold Emergency Meeting in Saudi Arabia on Iran War Crisis
item.description: Saudi Arabia hosted an emergency consultative meeting with other Persian Gulf leaders in Jeddah to discuss the ongoing Iran conflict and its regional implications. The summit reflects growing coordination among Gulf states amid the Hormuz standoff.

item.title: 🇪🇺💼 EU Trade Chief Resigns After Clashing Over Hasty Trump Deal
item.description: Sabine Weyand, who led the European Commission's trade department for seven years, is leaving after clashing with superiors over a hastily agreed trade deal with U.S. President Donald Trump. The departure highlights tensions in EU-US trade relations.

item.title: ⚔️🚁 US Military Expands Secret Boat Strike Operations with More Aircraft
item.description: The U.S. military has quietly increased the number of secret fixed-wing attack aircraft and armed MQ-9 Reaper drones for boat strike missions in the Iran conflict, according to officials. The expansion reflects the ongoing maritime dimension of the Hormuz standoff.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Rejects Russian Grain Theft Claims as Ukraine Threatens Sanctions
item.description: Foreign Minister Saar accuses Zelensky of "Twitter diplomacy" after Ukrainian president claims Israel "cannot be unaware" that Russian grain cargo at Haifa port came from occupied territory.

item.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesia Questions Lebanon Peacekeeping Mission as Casualties Mount
item.description: Calls are growing in Indonesia to scale back or end UN peacekeeping contributions in Lebanon after casualties increased amid regional conflict escalation.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Demands Israel Remove All Gaza Aid Barriers
item.description: France called on Israel to remove all restrictions on humanitarian aid to Gaza, citing dire conditions as the UN warns of worsening humanitarian crisis.

item.title: 🇭🇰 Hong Kong Exports Surge 35.8% on AI Electronics Demand
item.description: Hong Kong exports rose at the sharpest rate in over five years, up nearly 36% year-on-year in March, driven by strong demand for AI-related electronics.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇯🇵 China Denounces Japan and EU Over South China Sea at UN
item.description: China accused Japan of provocative behavior in the Taiwan Strait and planning military expansion after Tokyo and the EU raised concerns about the South China Sea at a UN Security Council meeting.

item.title: 📉🇪🇺 European Shares Subdued as US-Iran Talks Stall
item.description: European stocks were muted as investors weighed a diplomatic impasse in US-Iran negotiations while bracing for central bank meetings and corporate earnings.

item.title: 📊⚔️ Markets See Through Iran War as Permacrisis Becomes Norm
item.description: Record-high stocks amid a geopolitical shock puzzles investors. The dissonance suggests we are now stuck in a world of permanent crisis where markets exploit volatility.

item.title: 🛢️⛽ Oil Prices Rise as Hormuz Standoff Continues
item.description: Oil prices jumped over 3% as stalled efforts to end the Iran war kept the Strait of Hormuz largely closed, though UAE's OPEC exit trimmed gains.

item.title: 🇨🇳🤖 Meta-Manus AI Deal Unwinding Would Be Complex and Time-Consuming, Analysts Say
item.description: Beijing blocked Meta's $2 billion acquisition of Chinese AI startup Manus, but unraveling the deal will be difficult given integration progress over four months. Manus staff have moved into Meta offices and technology has been absorbed into Meta's ecosystem.

item.title: 🏛️🌍 UN General Assembly President Calls for Cross-Regional Alliance to Support UN Amid Iran and Gaza Wars
item.description: UNGA President Annalena Baerbock urged a cross-regional alliance to strengthen the United Nations as it navigates simultaneous crises from the Iran and Gaza conflicts.

item.title: ✈️⚙️ US Air Force Funds Final Development of Beehive Industries' Frenzy 8 Engine for Drone Systems
item.description: The USAF awarded $29.7 million to complete development of the additively manufactured 200-lb thrust Frenzy 8 engine, part of a strategy to develop low-cost disposable jet engines for unmanned aerial systems and standoff weapons.

item.title: 💰 World Bank Forecasts 24% Surge in Energy Prices
item.description: Energy prices are projected to surge 24% in 2026 to their highest level since Russia's 2022 invasion of Ukraine, driven by Middle East war disruptions. Commodity prices expected to hit four-year highs.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Euro Zone Inflation Expectations Surge on Iran War
item.description: Euro zone consumers have sharply raised inflation expectations due to the Iran war fallout, while economic growth is faltering—creating a policy dilemma for the European Central Bank.
